data.romajiQues: ( (maru) (maru) shi sadou wo tanoshimu kai ) ga , sanka suru nin ni tsutaetai koto ha dore ka .
data.translationQues: What does the ``○○ City Tea Ceremony Enjoyment Association'' want to convey to the participants?
romajiOption: sadou ha , iroiro na shokugyou no nin to donna koto de mo hanasete tanoshii .
sadou ha , shachou , shain , toshiyori , kodomo , dare de mo issho ni tanoshimeru .
( kyaku ) ga mina onaji kaisha no nin nara , shigoto no hanashi wo shite mo daijoubu da .
sadou ha yukkuri okonau no de , isogashii nin ha tanoshimu koto ga dekinai .
translationOption: Tea ceremony is fun because you can talk about anything with people from various professions.
A tea ceremony can be enjoyed by everyone, including company presidents, employees, the elderly, and children.
If the "customers" are all from the same company, it's okay to talk about work.
The tea ceremony is performed slowly, so busy people may not be able to enjoy it.
